title: cieca minima
intro: Cieca minima, also known as Cieca minima, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, which is a type of flowering plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antispasmodic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cieca minima include alleviating symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as providing relief from fever and general weakness. Cieca minima can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
